inline_comments.message: Shouldn't this snippet be idempotent? Image will be retrieved each time this provisioner is run.

I agree that it would be beneficial to keep such scripts idempotent.

This one is set to never run (L150) unless directly requested (as recommended in post-up message L45) - typically once per environment lifetime. Use case I had in mind (and use mostly) is to "vagrant up" -> run "post-up msg" recommendation -> "vagrant halt/up" (when environment is needed). This way I download the image once, store it in DevStack and clean it from /tmp on next boot.

Let me know which location you think would be good for such images (maybe "/root/os_images"?) - I'll patch this snippet with proper location and "continue download" flag for wget

Ok sorry, I didn't tackle the fact that the policy in L150 is actually "never"; in that context my remark is irrelevant.

/root/ dir should work ok I suppose.
